  Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" (refactor.rewrite.effect.wrapWithPipe)
  Refactor 1: "Rewrite as X.pipe(Y, Z, ...)" (refactor.rewrite.effect.togglePipeStyle)

=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = pipipe(p)e(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
)

const test3 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
)


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Rewrite as X.pipe(Y, Z, ...)" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = T.succeed("Hello").pipe(T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)), T.andThen(T.succeed(42)), T.map((_) => _ * 2))

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
)

const test3 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
)


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Rewrite to datafirst" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = T.map(T.andThen(T.flatMap(T.succeed("Hello"), _ => T.log(_)), T.succeed(42)), _ => _ * 2)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
)

const test3 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
)


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = T.gen(function*() { return yield* pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
) })

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
)

const test3 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
)


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = ppipe(i)pe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
)

const test3 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
)


=== [R2] Refactor 1: "Rewrite as X.pipe(Y, Z, ...)" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = T.succeed("Hello").pipe(T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)), noDataFirst("42"))

const test3 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
)


=== [R2] Refactor 2: "Rewrite to datafirst" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = pipe(T.flatMap(T.succeed("Hello"), _ => T.log(_)), noDataFirst("42"))

const test3 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
)


=== [R2] Refactor 3: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = T.gen(function*() { return yield* pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
) })

const test3 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
)


=== [R3] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
)

const test3 = ppipe(i)pe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
)


=== [R3] Refactor 1: "Rewrite as X.pipe(Y, Z, ...)" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
)

const test3 = T.succeed("Hello").pipe(T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)), noDataFirst("a"), noDataFirst("b"), noDataFirst("c"))


=== [R3] Refactor 2: "Rewrite to datafirst" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
)

const test3 = pipe(T.flatMap(T.succeed("Hello"), _ => T.log(_)), noDataFirst("a"), noDataFirst("b"), noDataFirst("c"))


=== [R3] Refactor 3: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/pipeableToDatafirst.ts ---
// refactor: 5:16-5:17, 14:16-14:17, 20:16-20:17
import * as T from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  T.andThen(T.succeed(42)),
  T.map((_) => _ * 2)
)

const noDataFirst = (value: string) => <A, E, R>(eff: T.Effect<A, E, R>) => pipe(eff, T.andThen(T.log(value)))

const test2 = pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("42")
)

const test3 = T.gen(function*() { return yield* pipe(
  T.succeed("Hello"),
  T.flatMap((_) => T.log(_)),
  noDataFirst("a"),
  noDataFirst("b"),
  noDataFirst("c")
) })
